code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let empty: List<Int> = []
  mut result = empty
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
    match b_opt
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if in_token
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          in_token = false
        end
      else
        if not in_token
          start = i
          in_token = true
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_token
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = parse_tokens(line1)
  mut output = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in tokens
    if x > t
      if first
        output = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        output = "#{output} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  println(output)
end
